headlines.title: U.S. government gives Anthropic green light for limited re-release of Mythos 5
headlines.description: The U.S. government is allowing Anthropic to deploy its Mythos 5 model to a select group of customers and partners, according to a letter from Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick to Anthropic that was seen by NBC News

headlines.title: Sen. Blumenthal demands Tesla be held accountable for alleged self-driving crash
headlines.description: The Tesla Model 3 crash killed a 76-year-old woman after years of scrutiny of Tesla’s driver assistance systems.

headlines.title: Apple’s shares plunge after it hikes prices on iPads and laptops
headlines.description: Apple said AI-fueled demand for memory chips has sent prices soaring, a market dynamic that some call “RAMageddon.”

headlines.title: An AI-generated Michael Caine is narrating Homer’s ‘Odyssey’ now
headlines.description: The voice generation company ElevenLabs released an audiobook version of the ancient Greek classic Tuesday.

headlines.title: How AI is helping fans follow the action and golfers navigate the rules at the U.S. Open
headlines.description: The U.S. Open at Shinnecock Hills showcases how the USGA is using AI technology to transform golf.

headlines.title: Trump orders retaliatory airstrikes against Iran
headlines.description: President Trump ordered retaliatory airstrikes against Iran for violating the ceasefire agreement by attacking a commercial ship in the Strait of Hormuz. NBC News’ Courtney Kube reports.

headlines.title: Miraculous rescues after deadly Venezuela earthquakes
headlines.description: There have been incredible rescues in Venezuela two days after those back-to-back earthquakes. NBC News’ George Solis reports.

headlines.title: Cabo Verde hace historia y clasifica tras igualar con Arabia Saudita
headlines.description: El empate 0-0 fue suficiente para que Cabo Verde avanzara a los dieciseisavos de final como segundo de grupo, luego de cerrar la fase de grupos con tres igualdades.

headlines.title: Bélgica aplasta a Nueva Zelanda y cierra líder de grupo
headlines.description: Bélgica goleó 5-1 a Nueva Zelanda con gran actuación colectiva y aseguró el liderato absoluto del grupo rumbo a los dieciseisavos de final de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026.

headlines.title: Apple Announces it is Raising Prices on MacBooks and iPads
headlines.description: Apple said on Thursday it will immediately raise prices on its MacBook laptops, iPads and iMac desktop computers. The announcement sent Apple shares falling about six percent, the biggest drop in more than a year.

headlines.title: Physicist reacts to Trump executive order calling for a quantum computer
headlines.description: NBC News' Gadi Schwartz talks to California Institute of Technology Professor John Preskill about President Trump's executive order calling for a quantum computer. Preskill talks about what he hopes comes out of the order and what to look out for.

headlines.title: AI-generated Michael Caine voice to narrate new edition of the 'Odyssey'
headlines.description: An AI-generated replica of actor Michael Caine's voice will narrate a new edition of the "Odyssey," produced by the company ElevenLabs. The London-based company, which launched in 2023, has ramped up its efforts to woo talent as it seeks to win over creatives wary of AI.
